title: Greetings & Introductions
description: Learn common greetings and how to introduce yourself in English
summary_pt_br: Cumprimentos e apresentações em inglês — formais e informais.

exercises.explanation: These are the most common English greetings you'll use every day.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Essas são as saudações mais comuns em inglês.

exercises.question: Someone says 'How do you do?' What's the best response?
exercises.explanation: 'How do you do?' is a formal greeting. The traditional response is to repeat it back.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'How do you do?' é formal. A resposta tradicional é repetir a mesma frase.

exercises.question: Hi! My ___ is Maria. I'm from Brazil.
exercises.explanation: 'My name is...' is the standard way to introduce yourself.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'My name is...' é a forma padrão de se apresentar.

exercises.question: Which greeting is appropriate at 8 PM?
exercises.explanation: Good evening is used from around 6 PM. 'Good night' is used when saying goodbye at night.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'Good evening' é usado a partir das 18h. 'Good night' é para despedida à noite.

exercises.explanation: These are common questions used when meeting someone new.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Good morning. I am fine, thanks.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am doing great. Nice to see you.

turns.speaker: user
